plugins.name: vibe2prod
plugins.description: Production-readiness auditor for AI-generated websites. 10 technical categories, project-independent 2Prod ship verdict (5 vetos + 27 hard gates), 0-100 Readiness Score, dual-audience layered report (vibe-coders + pros), interactive or autopilot fixing, fix-me.md handoff for other coding agents.
